name: Dr. Rehan Mahmood
headline: Satellite Communications | CubeSat Programs | NGN/NTN–PPDR
bio: Over 20 years in satellite technology, communication engineering, electronics, and systems work. Director and Principal Investigator of the Space Systems and Technology Research Lab (SSTRL) at the Institute of Space Technology. One of three Principal Investigators for ICUBE-Q, Pakistan's lunar CubeSat launched via Chang'e-6. Technical lead from the Pakistan side for APSCO Student Small Satellite-2A (SSS-2A) with Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Current focus: NGN/NTN–PPDR digital twin and simulator.
heroBio: Director of SSTRL and one of three PIs for ICUBE-Q, Pakistan's lunar CubeSat. Technical lead for SSS-2A with Shanghai Jiao Tong University.
